section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports a dime-size abrasion over the medial patella.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is phrased explicitly as a patient-reported finding rather than an observed exam finding, so it more strictly belongs in the Subjective section, though its placement in Objective is not highly misleading.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports no tenderness on the lateral side.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is framed as a patient report rather than a documented exam finding; by the template definition, patient-reported symptoms and absence of symptoms belong in Subjective.
